text: I am scheduled for the Friday afternoon desk on the 16th but I have a doctor's appointment that morning that may run long. Would anyone be able to take it, or trade for the following Friday.
I can take the 16th, Samantha. I am free that afternoon and happy to cover the desk.
Thank you, Ruth. That is a great help. I will take a Friday of yours later in the month to even it out.
Noted, both of you. I have updated the rota so Ruth has Friday the 16th and Samantha is down for the 30th. Thank you for sorting it between you.
I need to give up my Tuesday morning sorting shift on the 27th. Is anyone able to step in. It is the early slot, half past nine to noon.
I can cover that one. I am usually at the garden on Tuesday mornings but the plot is quiet this time of year, so the sorting room suits me fine.
Much appreciated, Samantha. I will return the favour when you need a morning off.
A reminder that swaps need to be posted here at least two days ahead so I can keep the desk covered. Thank you all for being prompt about it.
Planning for the May used book sale is starting. I am looking for volunteers to staff the tables across the three days. Please say which days suit you and I will build the schedule.
I can take the history and biography table for all three days. I have run it the last two years and I am glad to do it again.
Put me down for fiction on the Friday and Saturday. I cannot manage the Sunday this year.
I will help with setup on the Thursday evening and take the children's table Saturday morning.
That covers most of it. Thank you. I still need someone for the cash box on the Sunday afternoon. Robert, would that suit you.
Yes, I can do the Sunday afternoon cash box. I will bring the float and the receipt book.

One small thing for the history table. We had far too many duplicate hardbacks last year. If we could box the duplicates separately and price them lower, the table reads more clearly. I am happy to sort that on the Thursday.
That is a sensible idea. Let us do the same on the fiction table. I will bring extra boxes Thursday evening.
Welcome to the new volunteers joining this autumn. Please introduce yourself here and let me know which shifts you would prefer. The shift-swaps channel is for trades once you are on the rota.
Glad to have the channel. I tend to do Friday afternoons at the desk and the occasional Tuesday sorting morning. I am also on the book sale committee in the spring.
